message:
Running command: # Yosys now in pipe_read (ABC running!) at 15.9% CPU, 10.8% mem (900MB)
# ABC technology mapping phase - expected to take 30-90 more minutes
# Continue with 10-min polls for up to 6 hours

SYNTH_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

prev_drain=0
for i in $(seq 1 36); do
  sleep 600  # 10 min

  Y_ALIVE=$(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LR_ALIVE=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  DRAIN_BYTES=$(stat -c%s /tmp/yosys_drain.log 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  NL=$(ls "$SYNTH_DIR/"*.nl.v 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  YMEM=$(ps -p ${Y_ALIVE:-1} -o pmem --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  YWCHAN=$(ps -p ${Y_ALIVE:-1} -o wchan --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  DELTA=$((DRAIN_BYTES - prev_drain))
  prev_drain=$DRAIN_BYTES

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE} Y=${Y_ALIVE:-DONE}(${YMEM}%,${YWCHAN}) | step=$STEP | drain=$(numfmt --to=iec $DRAIN_BYTES 2>/dev/null || echo ${DRAIN_BYTES}B) Δ=$(numfmt --to=iec $DELTA 2>/dev/null || echo ${DELTA}B)"
  [ -n "$NL" ] && echo "  *** NETLIST WRITTEN: $NL ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane DONE ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -30
    break
  fi
done

function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
